title: lycium shawii var. leptophyllum
intro: Lycium shawii var. leptophyllum, also known as the 'Box Bush' or 'Box Holly', is a variety of flowering plant in the nightshade family, native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Lycium shawii var. leptophyllum include its ability to support immune function, reduce oxidative stress, and promote overall well-being. Lycium shawii var. leptophyllum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
